title: Damian Paletta, The Wall Street Journal’s Washington coverage chief, answers reader questions about President Trump and the Iran war. Read more in today’s WSJ Politics Newsletter:

President Trump has spent months talking about how badly he wants Chair Jerome Powell out of the Federal Reserve. Powell signaled Wednesday that he isn’t going anywhere.
